name: payment-gateway
description: Sandbox card-acceptance gateway for a US Node.js business — Adyen acquirer (Visa/Mastercard/Amex/Discover) with an embedded Drop-in checkout, settling into a Wise / Revolut Business account.

scripts.check: node -c src/server.js && node -c src/routes/sessions.js && node -c src/routes/webhooks.js && echo syntax-ok
